H5904.derivation: from H5892 (עִיר) and H5175 (נָחָשׁ); city of a serpent;

H5905.derivation: from H5892 (עִיר) and H8121 (שֶׁמֶשׁ); city of the sun;

H5906.strongs_def: the constellation of the Great Bear (perhaps from its migration through the heavens)

H5907.strongs_def: Akbor, the name of an Idumaean and of two Israelites

H5908.derivation: probably from an unused root in the literal sense of entangling;

H5909.derivation: probably from the same as H5908 (עַכָּבִישׁ) in the secondary sense of attacking;

H5910.derivation: apparently from an unused root meaning to hem in;
H5910.strongs_def: Akko (from its situation on a bay)

H5911.strongs_def: Akor, the name of a place in Palestine

H5912.derivation: from an unused root meaning to trouble; troublesome;

H5913.derivation: a primitive root; properly, to tie, specifically, with fetters; but used only as denominative from H5914 (עֶכֶס);

H5916.strongs_def: properly, to roil water; figuratively, to disturb or affict

H5919.derivation: probably from an unused root meaning to coil;

H5920.strongs_def: properly, the top; specifically, the highest (i.e. God); also (adverb) aloft, to Jehovah

H5921.derivation: properly, the same as H5920 (עַל) used as a preposition (in the singular or plural often with prefix, or as conjunction with a particle following);
H5921.strongs_def: above, over, upon, or against (yet always in this last relation with a downward aspect) in a great variety of applications
H5921.kjv_def: above, according to(-ly), after, (as) against, among, and, [idiom] as, at, because of, beside (the rest of), between, beyond the time, [idiom] both and, by (reason of), [idiom] had the charge of, concerning for, in (that), (forth, out) of, (from) (off), (up-) on, over, than, through(-out), to, touching, [idiom] with.

H5922.strongs_def: {above, over, upon, or against (yet always in this last relation with a downward aspect) in a great variety of applications}
H5922.kjv_def: about, against, concerning, for, (there-) fore, from, in, [idiom] more, of, (there-, up-) on, (in-) to, [phrase] why with.
H5922.usage: upon(19x), over(13x), unto(9x), against(7x), concerning(6x), in(6x), for(4x), about(3x)

H5923.strongs_def: a yoke (as imposed on the neck), literally or figuratively

H5926.derivation: from an unused root meaning to stutter;

H5927.strongs_def: to ascend, intransitively (be high) or actively (mount); used in a great variety of senses, primary and secondary, literal and figurative
H5927.kjv_def: arise (up), (cause to) ascend up, at once, break (the day) (up), bring (up), (cause to) burn, carry up, cast up, [phrase] shew, climb (up), (cause to, make to) come (up), cut off, dawn, depart, exalt, excel, fall, fetch up, get up, (make to) go (away, up); grow (over) increase, lay, leap, levy, lift (self) up, light, (make) up, [idiom] mention, mount up, offer, make to pay, [phrase] perfect, prefer, put (on), raise, recover, restore, (make to) rise (up), scale, set (up), shoot forth (up), (begin to) spring (up), stir up, take away (up), work.
H5927.usage: offer(67x), come(22x), bring(18x), ascend(15x), go(12x), chew(9x), offering(8x), light(6x), increase(4x), burn(3x), depart(3x), put(3x), spring(2x), raised(2x), arose(2x), break(2x), exalted(2x)

H5929.strongs_def: a leaf (as coming up on a tree); collectively, foliage

H5930.derivation: or עוֹלָה; feminine active participle of H5927 (עָלָה);
H5930.strongs_def: a step or (collectively, stairs, as ascending); usually a holocaust (as going up in smoke)
H5930.kjv_def: ascent, burnt offering (sacrifice), go up to. See also H5766 (עֶוֶל).

H5931.derivation: (Aramaic) feminine from a root corresponding to H5927 (עָלָה);

H5933.derivation: or עַליָה; the same as H5932 (עַלְוָה);

H5934.derivation: passive participle of H5956 (עָלַם) in the denominative sense of H5958 (עֶלֶם);
H5934.strongs_def: (only in plural as abstract) adolescence; figuratively, vigor

H5936.derivation: feminine passive participle of an unused root meaning to suck;

H5937.strongs_def: to jump for joy, i.e. exult

H5939.derivation: feminine from an unused root meaning to cover;

H5944.strongs_def: something lofty, i.e. a stair-way; also a second-story room (or even one on the roof); figuratively, the sky
H5944.kjv_def: ascent, (upper) chamber, going up, loft, parlour.

H5945.strongs_def: an elevation, i.e. (adj.) lofty (compar.); as title, the Supreme
H5945.usage: High(18x), high(9x), upper(8x), higher(4x), highest(2x), above(1x), Highest(1x), uppermost(1x)

H5948.derivation: from H5953 (עָלַל) in the sense of completing;
H5948.strongs_def: probably a crucible (as working over the metal)

H5949.derivation: or עֲלִלָה; from H5953 (עָלַל) in the sense of effecting;
H5949.strongs_def: an exploit (of God), or a performance (of man, often in a bad sense); by implication, an opportunity
H5949.kjv_def: act(-ion), deed, doing, invention, occasion, work.
H5949.usage: doing(14x), works(3x), deeds(2x), occasions(2x), actions(1x), acts(1x), inventions(1x)

H5953.strongs_def: to effect thoroughly; specifically, to glean (also figuratively); by implication (in a bad sense) to overdo, i.e. maltreat, be saucy to, pain, impose (also literal)
H5953.kjv_def: abuse, affect, [idiom] child, defile, do, glean, mock, practise, thoroughly, work (wonderfully).
H5953.usage: glean(4x), done(3x), abuse(3x), mock(2x), affecteth(1x), children(1x), do(1x), defiled(1x), practise(1x), throughly(1x), wrought(1x)

H5954.derivation: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5953 (עָלַל) (in the sense of thrusting oneself in),
H5954.kjv_def: bring in, come in, go in.

H5955.strongs_def: only in plural gleanings; by extension gleaning-time

H5956.strongs_def: to veil from sight, i.e. conceal (literally or figuratively)
H5956.kjv_def: [idiom] any ways, blind, dissembler, hide (self), secret (thing).

H5957.strongs_def: remote time, i.e. the future or past indefinitely; often adverb, forever

H5958.strongs_def: properly, something kept out of sight, i.e. a lad

H5960.derivation: from H5956 (עָלַם); hidden; See also H5963 (עַלְמֹן דִּבְלָתָיְמָה).

H5961.strongs_def: properly, girls, i.e. the soprano or female voice, perhaps falsetto

H5962.derivation: (Aramaic) patrial from a name corresponding to H5867 (עֵילָם) contracted;
H5962.strongs_def: an Elamite or inhabitant of Elam

H5963.derivation: from the same as H5960 (עַלְמוֹן) and the dual of H1960 (הֻיְּדָה) (compare H1015 (בֵּית דִּבְלָתַיִם)) with enclitic of direction; Almon towards Diblathajim;

H5964.strongs_def: Alemeth, the name of a place in Palestine and of two Israelites

H5965.strongs_def: to leap for joy, i.e. exult, wave joyously

H5968.strongs_def: to veil or cover; figuratively, to be languid

H5970.strongs_def: to jump for joy, i.e. exult

H5971.strongs_def: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock

H5972.strongs_def: {a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock}

H5973.strongs_def: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
H5973.kjv_def: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

H5974.strongs_def: {adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)}
H5974.usage: with(9x), to(2x), from(2x), toward(1x), like(1x), unto(1x), by(1x)

H5975.strongs_def: to stand, in various relations (literal and figurative, intransitive and transitive)
H5975.kjv_def: abide (behind), appoint, arise, cease, confirm, continue, dwell, be employed, endure, establish, leave, make, ordain, be (over), place, (be) present (self), raise up, remain, repair, [phrase] serve, set (forth, over, -tle, up), (make to, make to be at a, with-) stand (by, fast, firm, still, up), (be at a) stay (up), tarry.
H5975.usage: stood(171x), stand(137x), set(32x), stay(17x), still(15x), appointed(10x), standing(10x), endure(8x), remain(8x), present(7x), continue(6x), withstand(6x), waited(5x), establish(5x)

H5978.kjv_def: against, by, from, [phrase] me, [phrase] mine, of, [phrase] that I take, unto, upon, with(-in.)

H5980.strongs_def: conjunction, i.e. society; mostly adverb or preposition (with prepositional prefix), near, beside, along with
H5980.kjv_def: (over) against, at, beside, hard by, in points.
H5980.usage: against(26x), beside(2x), answerable(1x), at(1x), hard(1x), points(1x)

H5982.strongs_def: a column (as standing); also a stand, i.e. platform

H5983.strongs_def: Ammon, a son of Lot; also his posterity and their country

H5988.derivation: from H5971 (עַם) and H410 (אֵל); people of God;
H5988.strongs_def: Ammiel, the name of three or four Israelites

H5989.derivation: from H5971 (עַם) and H1935 (הוֹד); people of splendor;
H5989.strongs_def: Ammihud, the name of three Israelites

H5990.derivation: from H5971 (עַם) and H2064 (זָבַד); people of endowment;

H5991.derivation: from H5971 (עַם) and H2353 (חוּר); people of nobility;

H5992.derivation: from H5971 (עַם) and H5068 (נָדַב); people of liberality;
H5992.strongs_def: Amminadab, the name of four Israelites

H5993.derivation: from H5971 (עַם) and H5081 (נָדִיב); my people (is) liberal;

H5996.derivation: from H5971 (עַם) and H7706 (שַׁדַּי); people of (the) Almighty;

H5997.derivation: from a primitive root meaning to associate;
H5997.strongs_def: companionship; hence (concretely) a comrade or kindred man

H5998.strongs_def: to toil, i.e. work severely and with irksomeness

H5999.strongs_def: toil, i.e. wearing effort; hence, worry, wheth. of body or mind
H5999.kjv_def: grievance(-vousness), iniquity, labour, mischief, miserable(-sery), pain(-ful), perverseness, sorrow, toil, travail, trouble, wearisome, wickedness.
H5999.usage: labour(25x), mischief(9x), misery(3x), travail(3x), trouble(3x), sorrow(2x), grievance(1x), grievousness(1x), iniquity(1x), miserable(1x), pain(1x), painful(1x), perverseness(1x), toil(1x), wearisome(1x), wickedness(1x)
